label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this square dance problem. So, we have several dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Then there are a series of partner switches throughout the song. The question is, at the end of all the switches, who is Alice dancing with? The options are Jamie, Patrick, Ophelia, Melissa, or Rodrigo. Alright, first, I need to track each of these partner changes step by step. Let me write down the initial pairings to keep track: - Alice → Jamie - Bob → Patrick - Claire → Ophelia - Dave → Melissa - Eve → Rodrigo Now, the first switch is Dave and Bob switching partners. So Dave was with Melissa and Bob was with Patrick. So after switching, Dave would have Bob's partner, which is Patrick, and Bob would have Dave's partner, which is Melissa. Let me note that: After first switch (Dave and Bob): - Alice → Jamie - Bob → Melissa - Claire → Ophelia - Dave → Patrick - Eve → Rodrigo Wait, but I need to make sure I'm not making a mistake here. When two people switch partners, it means they swap their current partners. So if Dave is dancing with Melissa and Bob is dancing with Patrick, switching partners would mean Dave is now dancing with Patrick and Bob is dancing with Melissa. That's correct. Next step: Claire and Dave switch partners. Claire is currently dancing with Ophelia and Dave is dancing with Patrick. After switching, Claire will have Dave's partner (Patrick), and Dave will have Claire's partner (Ophelia). Let's update: After second switch (Claire and Dave): - Alice → Jamie - Bob → Melissa - Claire → Patrick - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Rodrigo Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. At this point, Eve is with Rodrigo, and Alice is with Jamie. After switching, Eve will have Alice's partner (Jamie) and Alice will have Eve's partner (Rodrigo). So: After third switch (Eve and Alice): - Alice → Rodrigo - Bob → Melissa - Claire → Patrick - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Jamie Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is currently with Patrick, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will have Jamie, and Eve will have Patrick. Let me update: After fourth switch (Claire and Eve): - Alice → Rodrigo - Bob → Melissa - Claire → Jamie - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Patrick Fifth and final switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. At this point, Alice is with Rodrigo and Eve is with Patrick. After switching, Alice will have Patrick and Eve will have Rodrigo. After fifth switch (Alice and Eve): - Alice → Patrick - Bob → Melissa - Claire → Jamie - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Rodrigo So according to this, Alice ends up with Patrick, which is option B. But wait, let me double-check all the steps to make sure I didn't make a mistake. It's easy to mix up the order. Initial pairings: 1. Dave
